note: v3.1 config is historical evidence; Gate-3 binding artifact fills ONLY field names/clocks/signs/validity - never profile-law behavior. Gate-3 checks identity (digest) AND completeness (zero PENDING in the effective config).

one_deadline.on_exhausted: SCRIPT_TERMINATES (failed reset never precedes an identical next primitive)
one_deadline.phase_timeouts: NONE - the total is the only deadline

p0a_acquisition.alt_ref: median, IMMUTABLE for the whole script

p1.detector_note: 0.02/tick < 0.35 floor: ZERO detector events; script provenance only

p3.detector_note: the ONLY window-minting event in the script

p5.detector_note: |v_cmd| <= 0.30 AND |dv| <= 0.15 < 0.35: no P5 detector event, BY LAW
p5.slew_recurrence: delta[i] = clamp(target[i] - v_cmd[i-1], -0.15, +0.15); v_cmd[i] = v_cmd[i-1] + delta[i]
p5.success: abs(e_alt) <= 0.15 for 10 consecutive ticks AND post-slew v_cmd == 0.0
